douyinDownloader.name: Douyin Video Downloader
douyinDownloader.description: Paste a Douyin share link to download videos without watermark. Fast, free, and no registration required.

instructions.title: How to Use
instructions.step1: Open the Douyin app and find the video you want to download
instructions.step2: Tap the share button and copy the link
instructions.step3: Paste the link above and click Download
instructions.step4: Save the video to your device
